message:
✨ Add one-click Install button to marketplace items (#1216)

Each marketplace card now has an 'Install' button that:
- Detects if KubeStellar Console is running locally (port 8080)
- If running: installs the item directly via Console API or deep link
- If not running: shows Console install instructions (brew, docker, go)
- Always offers manual JSON download as fallback

The install modal auto-detects Console status, supports custom port
configuration, and provides copy-to-clipboard for install commands.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
